tasks.title: Add PublicPoiCategorySchema Zod schema
tasks.description: RESOLVED BY REUSE (DRY): the existing PoiCategoryPublicSchema (packages/schemas/src/entities/poi-category/poi-category.access.schema.ts) already has the exact public shape { id, slug, nameI18n, icon, displayWeight } and is exported from @repo/schemas. No new schema created — the public catalog route (T-003) uses PoiCategoryPublicSchema as its response item schema. Covered by the existing poi-category access-schema tests.

tasks.title: Add public read method to PoiCategoryService
tasks.description: Add a read method on PoiCategoryService (packages/service-core) that returns ACTIVE, non-deleted categories sorted by displayWeight asc then slug, shaped as PublicPoiCategorySchema. Reuse BaseModelImpl.findAll on PoiCategoryModel with lifecycleState=ACTIVE / deletedAt=null. Tests (TDD, write first): unit test that soft-deleted/non-active categories are excluded and ordering is displayWeight then slug (AC-1).

tasks.title: Add public route GET /api/v1/public/poi-categories
tasks.description: Add public/list.ts under apps/api/src/routes/poi-category/ using createPublicListRoute (mirror an existing public catalog route). Validate empty query, call PoiCategoryService.listPublic, return array of PublicPoiCategorySchema, set cacheTTL consistent with other public catalog routes. Wire publicPoiCategoryRoutes into apps/api/src/routes/index.ts. Tests: route integration test asserting 200, shape, and active-only ordering (AC-1).

tasks.title: Add categories[] to DestinationPointOfInterestSummarySchema
tasks.description: Extend DestinationPointOfInterestSummarySchema (packages/schemas) with categories: z.array(z.object({ slug: z.string() })) — the full category set of the POI, additive alongside the existing primaryCategory (spec section 7, D-4). Tests: update schema unit test to assert categories[] is present and primaryCategory unchanged.

tasks.title: Aggregate all POI categories in getPointsOfInterestMap
tasks.description: Extend DestinationModel.getPointsOfInterestMap (packages/db/src/models/destination/destination.model.ts) to aggregate every r_poi_category row per POI into categories: { slug }[] (json_agg or grouped fetch), reusing the existing JOIN that already resolves primaryCategory (HOS-182). Must NOT regress the HOS-135 pagination-truncation fix nor primaryCategory. Tests (TDD): model test on a POI-rich destination (Colon) asserting a multi-category POI returns all its slugs and primaryCategory still resolves (AC-2, R-1).

subtasks.title: Add category aggregation to the query

tasks.title: Thread categories[] through DestinationService.getPointsOfInterest
tasks.description: Propagate the aggregated categories[] from getPointsOfInterestMap through DestinationService.getPointsOfInterest and the summary mapper (toDestinationPointOfInterestSummary or equivalent) so the endpoint response carries categories[]. Tests: service test asserting the mapped summary includes categories[] (AC-2).

subtasks.title: Service test asserts categories[] on summary

tasks.title: Register POI-category facet in facet-config.ts
tasks.description: Add a new FacetId for POI categories in apps/web/src/lib/filters/facet-config.ts: paramKey 'categories', singularParamKey undefined, operator 'OR', enum undefined (DB-driven, mirror the destinationAttraction precedent). This makes readFacetActiveValues / buildMultiToggleParamHref work unchanged for the new facet. Tests: unit test that read + toggle helpers resolve the new facet's CSV param correctly.

subtasks.title: Unit test read/toggle for new facet

tasks.title: Shared OR category-filter predicate util
tasks.description: Add a single shared predicate (e.g. matchesAnyCategory(poiCategorySlugs, activeSlugs)) in apps/web/src/lib/filters/ used by cards, PRIMARY markers, and NEARBY markers so the OR logic exists once (spec section 12, R-3). Empty active set = show all. Tests (TDD): unit tests for OR semantics, multi-category match, empty selection (AC-3, AC-4, AC-6).

tasks.title: Build DestinationPOIFilter chip island
tasks.description: Create the client island (apps/web/src/components/destination/DestinationPOIFilter.client.tsx) that renders present-only category chips (D-5: only categories present in the loaded POI set, using catalog metadata for label/icon/color via getPoiCategoryIcon/getPoiCategoryColorScheme). Follow FilterChips.astro shape: <a> based, aria-current (never aria-pressed), 'Clear (N)' chip when >=2 active via buildClearFacetChip. Read initial ?categories= via readFacetActiveValues; on toggle update URL with history.pushState (buildMultiToggleParamHref semantics, drop page) and apply the filter to the SSR cards. Tests: component test for present-only chip source + aria-current toggling (AC-5, AC-7).

subtasks.title: Render present-only chips with catalog metadata
Apply filter to cards + Clear(N) chip

tasks.title: Wire card visibility + empty state in DestinationPOISection.astro
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/destination/DestinationPOISection.astro, emit data-poi-categories (the POI's category slugs) on each SSR card so the chip island can toggle visibility by intersecting with the active set (OR, via T-008 predicate). Keep cards server-rendered (SEO). Add an explicit empty state shown when the active selection matches zero visible cards, chips still adjustable (AC-6, AC-8). Tests: rendering test asserting data-poi-categories present and empty-state markup exists.

tasks.title: Fetch category catalog SSR + thread props in destination page
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/destinos/[...path].astro, fetch the public POI-category catalog once server-side (new endpoint from T-003, via a new endpoints.ts wrapper) and compute the present-only category list from the already-built pointsOfInterest set (D-5). Pass the catalog + categories to DestinationPOISection, DestinationPOIMap, and the new chip island. Tests: endpoints.ts wrapper unit test; page-prop wiring covered indirectly by T-013.

subtasks.title: Fetch catalog SSR + compute present-only list
Pass props to section, map, island

tasks.title: Filter map markers on category change
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/destination/DestinationPOIMap.client.tsx (and MultiMarkerMapInner), apply the shared OR predicate (T-008) to both the SSR-provided PRIMARY markers and the client-fetched NEARBY markers. Read the active set from the current URL on mount (re-apply if the island toggled before the map hydrated, R-2) and listen for window CustomEvent 'hospeda:poi-category-filter' (detail { categories }) for live updates. Tests: island test that a filter event hides non-matching markers and NEARBY markers honor the same filter (AC-3, R-3).

subtasks.title: Read initial active set from URL on mount

tasks.title: Web integration + a11y tests for the filter
tasks.description: Cross-cutting tests: toggling a chip filters cards AND map in sync with no reload; multi-select OR; URL reflects ?categories= and a deep-link reproduces the filtered view after hydration; empty state; aria-current (not aria-pressed) and keyboard operability; SSR HTML of the destination page still contains the full POI set (SEO regression guard). Covers AC-3..AC-8.

subtasks.title: Chip toggle filters cards+map in sync

tasks.title: Document the client-side POI category filter
tasks.description: Update apps/web/docs and the relevant CLAUDE.md gotchas: POI thematic filter is client-side over the already-loaded list (endpoint has no category query param); the destination-POI payload now carries categories[] (all categories) alongside primaryCategory; new public GET /api/v1/public/poi-categories catalog endpoint. Note the D-3/D-4/D-5 decisions.
